FX.title: FX: Geopolitical Shockwave – USD/JPY Target 147.30 Amid Middle East Escalation
tldr_points: Middle‑East tension fuels risk‑off, Yen support
Trade 147.30 TP / 148.80 SL with high‑liquidity broker
FX.excerpt: Risk‑off surge after US‑Iran talks collapse drives USD/JPY lower; target 147.30, SL 148.80.
FX.comment: Risk-off surge after US‑Iran talks collapse lifts yen; price below MA20 and RSI weakening.
